title: Save & Load Game State
key_classes: SaveIO — static facade: entry point for save/load; manages versioned SaveVersion registry (Save1..Save11)
SaveFileReader — abstract base: chunk/region read-write primitives, fallback name maps, CustomChunk interface
SaveVersion extends SaveFileReader — full serialisation logic per version; abstract read/write per region
SaveMeta — plain data holder: version, build, timestamp, timePlayed, map, wave, rules, tags, mods
NetworkIO — multiplayer world sync: delegates to SaveIO.getSaveWriter() for all region writes/reads
save_activity_flow: [exists?] → YES: backup current file via file.moveTo(backupFileFor(file))
[exception?] → YES: restore backup → throw RuntimeException | NO: continue
get latest SaveVersion via getVersion() [versionArray.peek() = Save11]
build StringMap: saved, playtime, build, mapname, wave, tick, wavetime, stats, rules, sectorPreset, locales, mods, controlGroups, width, height, viewpos, controlledType, nocores, playerteam
iterate content map; write MappableContent type ordinals, counts, names
[patches exist?] → write byte count + each patch bytes | else write 0
LOOP tiles: write floorID, overlayID + RLE consecutive byte
LOOP tiles: write blockID, packed flags (entity|data bits)
[hasData?] → write data, floorData, overlayData, extraData (7 bytes)
[no entity & no data?] → write RLE consecutive byte
writeTeamBlocks: write active team plans (BlockPlan x,y,rot,block,config)
writeWorldEntities: write serialisable entity count; per entity writeChunk(classId, id, beforeWrite, write)
LOOP enabled CustomChunks: write name UTF + writeChunk(chunk.write())
load_activity_flow: START: caller invokes SaveIO.load(Fi file) or load(Fi file, WorldContext context)
read version int → lookup SaveVersion in versions map
readStringMap → restore wave, wavetime, tick, stats, rules, mapLocales
[!headless] → restore camera pos, player pos, controlledType, team, controlGroups
resolve Map by name from maps registry
read mapped content types; build MappableContent[][] temp mapper
read patch byte arrays → fire ContentPatchLoadEvent → state.patcher.apply(patches)
read width/height; context.begin() (if not already generating)
LOOP floor pass: readShort floorID, overlayID + RLE; context.create(x,y,...)
LOOP block pass: read blockID, packed flags
[hadEntity & isCenter & hasBuilding?] → readChunkReads: read revision byte, tile.build.readAll()
[no entity & no data?] → read RLE consecutives; setBlock for range
LOOP entities: readChunkReads → get typeid, create entity, entity.read(in), entity.add()
handle duplicate IDs by reassigning new IDs
LOOP: read name UTF; [known chunk?] readChunk(chunk.read) | skipChunk
[exception from primary?] → try backup file; [no backup?] rethrow SaveException
network_world_sync_flow: NetworkIO.writeWorld(Player player, OutputStream os) — server → joining client
write rules JSON, mapLocales JSON, map tags StringMap
write wave, wavetime, tick, rand seeds
delegate: getSaveWriter().writeContentHeader, writeContentPatches, writeMap, writeTeamBlocks, writeMarkers, writeCustomChunks(net=true)
read wave, wavetime, tick, seeds; Groups.clear(); player.reset()/read()/add()
delegate: getSaveWriter().readContentHeader, readContentPatches, readMap, readTeamBlocks, readMarkers, readCustomChunks
version_handling: Versions Save1..Save11 registered at static init into IntMap<SaveVersion> versions
getMeta(stream): reads header → version int → delegates to SaveVersion.getMeta(stream) → returns SaveMeta
Read path: version < 8 skips markers region; version < 11 skips patches region (fires event from contentHeader instead)
SaveFileReader.fallback map handles legacy block/unit names for backward compat
chunk_region_protocol: writeRegion(name, stream, runner): wraps writeChunk; catches errors with region name context
readRegion(name, stream, counter, runner): resets CounterInputStream; reads chunk; validates byte count matches
writeChunk: writes int length prefix, then data bytes from ReusableByteOutStream
readChunk: reads int length, passes (stream, length) to runner
Nesting: chunkNested flag switches between byteOutput/byteOutput2 for one level of nesting
key_relationships: NetworkIO depends_on SaveIO (calls getSaveWriter() for all region IO)
CustomChunk interface (in SaveFileReader) allows mod extension points
important_notes: File format: deflated binary; header 'MSAV' + int version + regions
Backup strategy: on save, old file → '-backup' sibling; on load failure, fallback to backup
Content mapper: temporary ID→content mapper set during load, cleared in finally block
RLE compression used for floor tiles and non-entity blocks
Entity deduplication: duplicate IDs reassigned via EntityGroup.nextId()
Network sync (NetworkIO) reuses the same region writers but skips meta/entity world-entities regions; uses net=true flag to exclude non-net custom chunks
